name: GMB Crush
description:
What GMB Crush Does?

GMB Crush claims a smooth and an accurate experience, offering various features such as geo-grid heatmaps, location authority identification, pinpointing up-trending and down-trending locations, competitor benchmarking and more. 

Source: GMB Crush

Features: 

  • Has a geo-grid heatmap that helps you identify areas where your business is doing great
  • Helps identify “Up-trending” and “Down-trending” locations 
  • Competitor benchmarking to know how your competitors are performing by comparing your GBP ranking
  • Location authority identifies which profile is outperforing in a geographical area
  • White-label reporting features 
  • Schedules geo-grid ranking scans for individual or multiple keywords using the bulk feature

Benefits:

  • Precision insights that help you understand your rankings better 
  • Stay ahead of the competition by knowing who your competitors are for specific geographic locations 
  • Offers downloadable reports in both PNG and PDF formats
  • One can tailor the geo-grid ranking sizes as per their preferences 
  • Helps uncover the key players you need to scrutinize at both the Google Business Profile (GBP) and website levels

Pros 

  • Has a Facebook community that is active and comes in handy when someone needs advice on how to go about things.

Cons

  • Offers limited integration capabilities with other tools and channels 

Priced at $181 per year
